prompt.customInstructions: speedDIAL 2.0 is a React SPA. Login at '/#/login' with Material-UI inputs #username and #password, then submit via button[type=submit]. After login the URL settles on '/#/' (home). Search: fill '#searchTerm' (on home or any page) and press Enter; the app routes to '/#/pna' (Price & Availability) and renders '.product-quote' cards. Authentication posts to 'https://worldpac.my.site.com/sdpro/servlet/servlet.loginwidgetcontroller?type=login' behind the scenes; the adapter lets the SPA drive that.
prompt.knownIssues: Pre-filled username on first load (browser autofill). Always overwrite via native setter + input/change events so React state updates. Login failures surface as a div containing 'Failed to sign in' — no role=alert. Session cookie is set on worldpac.com domain via Cloudflare.
prompt.apiNotes: Internal REST (not public) at '/sdpro/servlet/servlet.loginwidgetcontroller' (auth) and similar endpoints; DOM scraping is the supported path. WCAP API exists but needs a separate API token issued from Settings → API Tokens.
